⚙️ Settings

🔗 Google Sheets Configuration

Paste the deployment URL from your Google Apps Script. Leave blank to use Demo Mode.

🔑 Change Owner PIN
🗂️ Google Sheet Column Headers (Row 1)

Copy these headers exactly into Row 1 of each sheet tab. The app reads and writes from Row 2 onwards.

📦 Inventory
ItemID ItemName Category Unit CurrentStock MinStockLevel LastUpdated
📥 StockReceived
Date ItemID ItemName Quantity Unit Source Supplier CostPerUnit TotalCost RecordedBy
📤 StockUsage
Date ItemID ItemName QuantityUsed Unit RecordedBy Notes
💸 Expenses
Date Category Description Amount PaymentMethod Vendor RecordedBy Notes ReceiptDataUrl ReceiptMimeType ReceiptName

Blue columns store receipt info. ReceiptDataUrl stores a clickable Google Drive link — tap it in Google Sheets to open the receipt image directly. The file is saved to your My Drive root. These columns should already be in your Expenses sheet.

💰 Income
Date Cash Card UPI Zomato Swiggy Others TotalIncome RecordedBy Notes
🏷️ Categories NEW — add this sheet

This sheet stores your custom expense categories so they sync across all devices.

type name createdAt
📖 How to Set Up Google Sheets
1

Create a Google Spreadsheet

Go to sheets.google.com and create a new spreadsheet. Name it "Restaurant Operations".

2

Create 6 Sheet Tabs

Create tabs named exactly: Inventory, StockReceived, StockUsage, Expenses, Income, Categories.

3

Add Column Headers

In each sheet, add the headers in Row 1 exactly as shown in the "Column Headers" section above. The app will read/write from Row 2 onwards.

4

Open Apps Script Editor

In your spreadsheet, go to Extensions → Apps Script. Delete any existing code.

5

Paste the Apps Script Code

Copy the complete code from the section below and paste it into the Apps Script editor.

6

Deploy as Web App & Authorize Drive

Click Deploy → New deployment. Set type to Web app. Set "Execute as" to Me and "Who has access" to Anyone. Click Deploy. When prompted, click Review Permissions → Advanced → Go to [project name] and click Allow. This grants Drive access so receipt photos are saved directly to your My Drive and stored as clickable links in Google Sheets. Copy the Web App URL.

7

Paste URL Above

Paste the Web App URL in the configuration field above and click Save URL.

📋 Google Apps Script Code
View Complete Apps Script Code ▼
🏷️ Manage Expense Categories

Add or remove categories that appear in the expense dropdowns. Default categories cannot be removed.

Public Expense Categories Staff visible
Owner Expense Categories Owner only
🔄 Demo Data

Reset demo data to the original sample dataset. This will erase any changes made in Demo Mode.

📎 Receipt / Document
